summary: Focused r2 of the Rev 2 folds (r1 REJECT B1/B2 + A1-A4). Hash matches Rev 2 (dc3e5f48…); dmc validate plan VALID. B1 fold faithful AND still detection-capable: re-ran v011-verify on HEAD => 39 PASS / 2 FAIL, the 2 FAILs exactly the pre-existing non-router rows (v011:31 stop-block, v011:77 skills-count); gate now asserts the 5 router-invariant rows + FAIL-count==2 with named rows (a broken invariant flips it to 3 — not laundered); v011 stays no-edit. B2 fold technically proven: portable char-class sed strips mixed-case DMC/DMC-PLAN correctly on BSD sed; re.sub with re.IGNORECASE matches; no over-strip (suffix anchor + matcher-gates-strip makes the 'edmc' case unreachable); LP1 clean-extraction probe verified correct on the single-line emits of BOTH adapters (router emit() + shim ups_context are single-line JSON). A1-A4 all present (unconditional SKILL.md line; fresh per-prompt sandbox dirs; HONEST_SCOPE anchor maps to the real '## 4. Disclosed residual register' heading; adapter READMEs no-edit). GATE-DECISIONS intact. No new defect. APPROVE, 0 blockers, 2 info advisories.

criteria_checked.note: empirical 39/2 baseline confirmed; 5-invariant-rows + FAIL==2-named gate satisfiable and regression-detecting
portable strips proven on BSD toolchain; over-strip unreachable; strip/matcher line cites verified
grep -vq exit 1 on leak / 0 on clean, single-line emits both adapters
all present at the cited plan loci
Rev 2 edits additive; ledger/ACs/no-edit set consistent

advisories.statement: LP1's grep -vq idiom is correct only because both emits are single-line JSON (verified) — emit-shape-fragile. For the T018.2 codex-side clean-extraction row use a shape-robust form (extract the task segment and assert equality, or `! grep -q <token>`) so the CI-blocking row cannot silently pass on a future shape change.

Pre-existing benign asymmetry: matcher requires a leading boundary, strip does not (safe because the strip only runs after the matcher fires). One-line note in the verification report so a future maintainer does not 'tighten' the strip and change extraction.
